dict.string: AudioAnalyzer captures system audio output (what you hear on speakers or headphones) when you choose the Core Audio tap desktop row, so it can analyze levels and spectrum in real time.
AudioAnalyzer captures the microphone or other audio inputs you choose so it can analyze levels and spectrum in real time.
AudioAnalyzer captures webcam video when you add an ASCII video layer, so it can render the live camera image as ASCII art in the terminal.
